nasb.text: Two parts of you, even all who go out on the sabbath, shall also keep watch over the house of the Lord for the king.

esv.text: And the two divisions of you, which come on duty in force on the Sabbath and guard the house of the Lord on behalf of the king,

cnv.text: 你們在安息日不用當值的兩班人，要為王的緣故守衛耶和華的殿。

ccb.text: 安息日没有值班的两队要在耶和华的殿里保护王，
